/home/runner/work/dlt-daemon/.codeql-scratch/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/cc -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/dlt.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libdlt.so.3 -o libdlt.so.3.0.1 CMakeFiles/dlt.dir/dlt_user.c.o CMakeFiles/dlt.dir/dlt_client.c.o CMakeFiles/dlt.dir/dlt_filetransfer.c.o CMakeFiles/dlt.dir/dlt_env_ll.c.o CMakeFiles/dlt.dir/__/shared/dlt_common.c.o CMakeFiles/dlt.dir/__/shared/dlt_log.c.o CMakeFiles/dlt.dir/__/shared/dlt_multiple_files.c.o CMakeFiles/dlt.dir/__/shared/dlt_protocol.c.o CMakeFiles/dlt.dir/__/shared/dlt_user_shared.c.o  -lrt
